title: Mission
description: Structured local mission record and status lifecycle. GAIL OS canonical source. Transport-neutral.

MissionStatus.description: Mandatory 12-stage action state machine. All governed actions must travel this sequence; no stage may be skipped.

mission_id.description: Unique mission identifier. Must use the 'mission-' prefix.

request_id.description: Originating request identifier. Must use the 'req-' prefix.

command.description: Operator intent string — the raw command or mission goal.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the mission was created.

owner.description: Human or system that owns this mission.

approval_level.description: Approval posture for this mission (e.g. 'A1 local no-network').

dry_run.description: If true, no live connectors or external actions are permitted.

requested_tools.description: Local tool identifiers requested for this mission.

data_classification.description: Data classification for this mission's inputs and outputs.

status.description: Draft lifecycle status of the mission record.

source_commit.description: Git commit SHA or reference at the time of mission creation.

$comment: MissionStatus enum is defined in $defs for reference by action.schema.json and other consumers.
